staffLoginDesc: Enter your email and password to access the admin panel.
autoLoginInvalid: Auto-login token is invalid or expired. Please log in.

dashboard.noOrdersDesc: Orders will appear here once customers start purchasing.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.noDataDesc: Analytics data will appear here as visitors browse your store. Page views, traffic sources, devices, and countries are tracked automatically.

invoice.computerNote: This is a computer-generated invoice. No signature required.

policies.showDesc: Toggle shipping, returns, and care guide sections on product pages
policies.title: Product Policies
policies.subtitle: These details appear as expandable sections on every product page

inventory.transferDifferent: Source and destination must be different
inventory.deleteLocationMsg: Delete location "{{name}}"? Stock must be zero or transferred first.
inventory.noLocationsConfigured: No locations configured. Go to the Locations tab above to add locations.
inventory.priorityHelp: Lower = higher priority for order fulfillment
inventory.noLocationsDesc: Add your first inventory location to track stock across warehouses, stores, or fulfillment centers.
inventory.howStep1Text: Add your warehouses, stores, or fulfillment centers.
inventory.howStep2Text: When adding or editing products, assign stock to each location. You can also manage stock from the Stock Overview tab.
inventory.howStep3Text: Move inventory between locations from the Stock Overview tab.
inventory.howStep4Text: When an order is placed, stock is deducted from the default location first, then by priority order. The total stock shown to customers is the sum across all locations.

search.placeholder: Search by order number, customer name, email or phone...

empty.noReturnsDesc: Return requests from customers will appear here.
empty.noCancellationsDesc: Cancellation requests from customers will appear here.
empty.noOrdersFilter: No orders match the selected filter.

warn.enterCancelReason: Please enter a specific cancellation reason.

modal.approvingWillCancel: Approving will cancel the order and restore product stock.
modal.cancelOrderDesc: Select a reason for cancellation. Both you and the customer will receive an email.

modal.deleteCategoryMsg: Delete this category? Products in this category will not be deleted.

intro.categoriesText: help customers browse your products. Create main categories (like "Necklaces" or "Rings"), then add subcategories inside them for finer organization (like "Gold", "Silver"). Click on any category to manage its subcategories.
intro.homepage: Control how your categories appear on the store's homepage. You can show product sections for each category, add featured subcategory sections, enable circular browse icons, and reorder everything.

categories.emptyDesc: Create your first category above to organize your products.
categories.pendingNotSaved: Not saved yet — click "Save Changes" to create
categories.noSubcategories: No subcategories yet. Add one below.

groupHint.withText: groups similar subcategories together (e.g. group "Material" with items Gold, Silver, Platinum).

browseCircles.title: Browse by Category Circles
browseCircles.subtitle: Circular icons on homepage for quick browsing
browseCircles.empty: Create categories first, then come back here to set up browse circles.

featured.title: Featured Subcategory Sections
featured.subtitle: Highlight specific subcategories on the homepage
featured.intro: Add product sections that show items from a specific subcategory. For example, show only "Gold Necklaces" or "Cotton Sarees" as a featured section on your homepage.

order.title: Section Display Order
order.subtitle: Drag sections up or down to change their homepage order
order.intro: Arrange the order in which product sections appear on your homepage. The first section shows right after the hero banner.

productForm.subcategoryHint: Manage subcategory groups in the Categories section
productForm.gstRateHint: Tax rate applied on this product
productForm.dropImages: Drop images here or click to upload
productForm.supportedFormats: Supports JPG, PNG, WebP — compressed & uploaded to cloud storage
productForm.noColorsDefined: No colors defined. Add colors to let customers filter images by color.
productForm.assignColorHint: Use the "Assign Color" dropdown on each image above to tag it with a color.
productForm.enableColorsHint: Enable to add color options for this product.
productForm.noCustomOptions: No custom options. Add options like Size, Weight, etc. that don't affect price.
productForm.enableCustomOptionsHint: Enable to add custom options like Size, Weight, etc.
productForm.noPricedOptions: No priced options. Add options like Dupatta, Chain Type, etc. that add to the base price.
productForm.enablePricedOptionsHint: Enable to add priced options that affect the product price.

errors.stockNegative: Stock per location cannot be negative.
errors.imagesRequired: At least one product image is required.

featureGate.upgradeBody: Upgrade your plan to {{plan}} to unlock {{feature}} and more.

categoryDesc.jewellery: Shop exquisite jewellery at {{brand}}. Explore rings, necklaces, earrings, bracelets & more. Secure payments & nationwide delivery.
categoryDesc.clothing: Discover the latest fashion at {{brand}}. Shop clothing, accessories & more with easy returns & fast shipping.
categoryDesc.beauty: Shop premium beauty & cosmetics at {{brand}}. Skincare, makeup & more with secure checkout & fast delivery.
categoryDesc.general: Shop online at {{brand}}. Explore our curated collection with secure checkout, easy returns & fast delivery.

seoSection.errImageType: Use JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF.
seoSection.faviconHint: Recommended: 32x32 or 64x64 PNG. This icon appears in browser tabs and bookmarks.
seoSection.errFaviconType: Invalid file type. Use PNG, ICO, SVG, or WebP.
seoSection.faviconUploaded: Favicon uploaded! Click "Save SEO Settings" to apply.
seoSection.siteTitleHint: Recommended: 50-60 characters. Shown in Google results and browser tab.
seoSection.metaDescHint: Recommended: 120-160 characters. Affects click-through rate from Google.
seoSection.siteKeywordsHint: Comma-separated keywords for your store. Helps some search engines and social platforms understand your content.
seoSection.indexingHint: Controls whether Google can find and index your store.
seoSection.googleVerificationPlaceholder: Paste your Google Search Console verification code here
seoSection.googleVerificationHint: Get this from Google Search Console → Verify ownership → HTML tag method. Paste only the content value (not the full tag).
seoSection.sitemapDesc: These files are generated automatically. Submit your sitemap URL to Google Search Console so Google can discover all your pages.
seoSection.noCategoriesFound: No categories found. Add categories from the Products section first.
seoSection.categoriesIntro: Customize SEO for each category page. Fields are auto-filled from your category data — edit to override.
seoSection.errSaveSocial: Failed to save social media tags
seoSection.ogImageHintCategory: This image appears when the category is shared on WhatsApp, Facebook, Twitter, etc. Recommended: 1200x630px.
seoSection.ogImageHintProduct: This image appears when the product is shared on WhatsApp, Facebook, Twitter, etc. Recommended: 1200x630px.
seoSection.ogImageHintGeneric: Upload an image for social sharing (1200x630px recommended).
seoSection.ogImageHintHome: Appears when your site is shared on Facebook, WhatsApp, etc. (1200x630px recommended)
seoSection.noProductsFound: No products found. Add products from the Products section first.
seoSection.productsIntro: SEO fields are pre-filled from your product data. Edit to customize how each product appears in Google and social media.
seoSection.pagesIntro: Set custom SEO title and description for each static page. Fields are pre-filled with auto-generated defaults — edit to override.

pageDefaultDesc.home: Welcome to {{brand}}. Shop our latest collection with secure payments and fast delivery.
pageDefaultDesc.about: Learn about {{brand}} — our story, mission, and what makes us different.
pageDefaultDesc.contact: Get in touch with {{brand}}. We'd love to hear from you.
pageDefaultDesc.privacy: Privacy Policy for {{brand}}. Learn how we protect your data.
pageDefaultDesc.terms: Terms and Conditions for {{brand}}. Read our policies before shopping.

seoSection.socialIntro: Control how your site appears when shared on Facebook, WhatsApp, Twitter/X, and other platforms. If left empty, values from your Site SEO settings are used as defaults.
seoSection.ogTitleHint: Leave empty to use your site SEO title.
seoSection.ogDescHint: Leave empty to use your site meta description.
seoSection.ogTypeHint: Default type for your homepage. Product pages automatically use "product".
seoSection.twitterTitleHint: Leave empty to use OG title.
seoSection.twitterImageHint: Leave empty to use OG image.
seoSection.autoManagedDesc: These tags are set automatically for every page. No action needed.
seoSection.structuredDataDesc: Rich data that helps Google understand your store. Generated from your store information — verify the values below are correct.
seoSection.customizableDesc: These fields can be customized using the other tabs. Smart defaults are used automatically if left empty.

tags.themeColorDetail: <meta name="theme-color" content="{{color}}"> — colors the mobile browser bar

schema.name: Name
schema.notSetLogo: Not set — add a logo in Store Settings
schema.productIncludes: Name, price, currency, availability, images, SKU, barcode
schema.shippingValue: Delivery time, handling time, destination country
schema.editProductDetails: Data comes from your product details
schema.categoryIncludes: Category name, product list with URLs
schema.articleIncludes: Headline, excerpt, author, published date, modified date
schema.editBlogPosts: Data comes from your blog posts

editable.allTabs: Site SEO, Products, Categories, Pages tabs
editable.author: Author
editable.socialTabAuto: Social Media tab (auto "product" on product pages)
editable.ogImagePerWhere: Products & Categories tabs (auto-uses product image if not set)

settingsSection.fixGstinFirst: Please fix the invalid GSTIN before saving.
settingsSection.currencyChangedMsg: Currency changed to {{currency}} successfully! Converted {{products}} product(s) and {{coupons}} coupon(s).

storeUrl.title: Store URL
storeUrl.accessibleAt: Your store is currently accessible at {{url}}
storeUrl.confirmDesc: Changing your subdomain will update your store URL from {{from}} to {{to}}. The old URL will stop working immediately.

errors.short: Subdomain must be at least 3 characters
errors.format: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens allowed. Must start and end with a letter or number.

customDomain.title: Custom Domain
customDomain.intro: Connect your own domain (e.g. www.mystore.com) to your store. Only www. subdomains are supported — root domains like mystore.com are not supported.
customDomain.verifiedDesc: Your domain has been verified and SSL certificate is being provisioned.
customDomain.savedDomainMsg: Domain saved! Now add the DNS records below and click Verify.
customDomain.verifiedMsg: Domain verified successfully! Your custom domain is now active.
customDomain.removeMessage: Are you sure you want to remove the custom domain?
customDomain.step2Note: Add this as a TXT record with host <c>_flomerce-verify</c> on your domain provider.

errors.www: Domain must start with www. (e.g. www.mystore.com)
errors.full: Please enter a full domain like www.mystore.com

whatsNext.title: What happens next?
whatsNext.item1: SSL certificate is issued automatically — this usually takes 5–15 minutes.
whatsNext.item2: DNS changes can take up to 48 hours to propagate worldwide, though most work within 1–2 hours.
whatsNext.item3: During this time, visitors may see a security warning or "site not found" — this is normal.
whatsNext.item4: Once live, your store will be accessible at https://{{domain}}

rootRedirect.title: Root domain redirect (recommended)
rootRedirect.desc: So visitors who type {{root}} are automatically sent to {{www}}
rootRedirect.cloudflareNote: Only works on Cloudflare (CNAME flattening). Then add a Redirect Rule: {{root}} → https://{{www}}
rootRedirect.othersDesc: These providers don't support CNAME on the root domain. Instead, use the "Forwarding" or "URL Redirect" feature in your domain settings to forward {{root}} → https://{{www}}

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.phoneHelp: Used for contact page, store locations, and as fallback for the floating button if no WhatsApp is set
contact.whatsappHelp: If added, the floating button and featured video chat will redirect to WhatsApp
contact.floatingHelpNone: Add a phone or WhatsApp number first
contact.ccDesc: Staff or team members added here will receive the same order notifications (new order, cancellation, return, delivery) sent to your owner email. Up to 5 addresses.
contact.ccGrowthLock: Upgrade to Growth or higher to add staff notification recipients.

currency.title: Default Currency
currency.intro: Set the default currency for your store. All prices on your website, admin panel, and email notifications will be shown in this currency.
currency.selectorDesc: Toggle the currency selector on the bottom navigation bar

confirm.title: Change Store Currency
confirm.warning1: Exchange rates fluctuate constantly. The rate used is a snapshot at this moment and may differ from the actual rate later.
confirm.warning2: Minor rounding differences may occur during conversion (e.g., $9.99 may become a slightly different value if converted back).
confirm.warning3: This action cannot be perfectly reversed — converting back will use the then-current exchange rate, which may differ.
confirm.willConvert1: Product prices (price, compare price, cost price)
confirm.willConvert2: Coupon values (fixed discount amounts, minimum order values, max discount caps)
confirm.willNot1: Existing orders — they are historical records and will retain their original currency
confirm.willNot2: Shipping charges in settings — you will need to update these manually
confirm.willNot3: Percentage-based coupon values — only the fixed amounts and thresholds are converted

timezone.title: Store Timezone
timezone.intro: Set your store's business timezone. All dates and times in the admin panel (orders, analytics, etc.) will be displayed in this timezone. Your customers will see times in their own local timezone.

shipping.title: Shipping & Delivery Charges
shipping.intro: Configure delivery charges for your store. When disabled, all orders ship free.
shipping.baseHelp: This flat rate applies to every order by default
shipping.freeAboveDesc: Waive delivery fee for orders above a minimum value
shipping.freeAboveHelp: Orders at or above this amount get free delivery
shipping.overridesDesc: Set different rates per country or country + state (optional)
shipping.priorityNote: Priority: country + state match first, then country-only match, then flat rate fallback. Leave state empty for a country-wide rate.

cancellation.title: Order Cancellation
cancellation.intro: Allow customers to request cancellation of pending or confirmed orders. When enabled, a cancel link will be included in order confirmation emails.
cancellation.toggleDesc: Customers can request cancellation before shipping
cancellation.windowHelp: Customers can request cancellation within this many hours after placing their order

returns.title: Return Orders
returns.intro: Allow customers to request returns on delivered orders. When enabled, a return link will be included in delivery emails.
returns.toggleDesc: Customers can request returns after delivery
returns.windowHelp: Customers can request a return within this many days after their order is delivered
returns.replacementDesc: Customers can choose between refund or replacement when returning

tracking.title: Order Tracking
tracking.intro: Configure how customers can track their orders. You can use the built-in tracking page or redirect to an external tracking service.
tracking.toggleDesc: Show or hide the Order Tracking link in the navigation bar
tracking.urlPh: https://shiprocket.co/tracking or leave empty for built-in page
tracking.urlHelp: If provided, customers without a specific order number will be redirected to this URL. Leave empty to use the built-in order tracking page where customers can search by order number.

gst.title: GST & Invoicing
gst.toggleDesc: Turn on to add GST fields to products and generate tax invoices
gst.disabledNote: GST is disabled. Enable it to configure GSTIN, HSN codes, GST rates, and tax invoicing.
gst.intro: Set up your GST details to generate proper tax invoices for orders. If you are not GST registered, leave these empty — a simple bill will still be available.
gst.legalNameHelp: May differ from your store display name
gst.stateHelp: Used to determine CGST/SGST vs IGST
gst.emailToggleLabel: Include Invoice Link in Order Emails
gst.emailToggleDesc: Customers will get a "Download Invoice" link in their order confirmation email

whatsappBusiness.title: WhatsApp Business Notifications
whatsappBusiness.intro: Send automated order updates to customers via WhatsApp. Customers must opt-in at checkout. You need your own WhatsApp Business API credentials.
whatsappBusiness.toggleDesc: Send order confirmation, shipping, delivery updates via WhatsApp
whatsappBusiness.providerHelpMeta: Free for first 1,000 conversations/month. Get credentials from Meta Business Suite.
whatsappBusiness.providerHelpInterakt: India-focused provider backed by Razorpay. Get your API key from app.interakt.ai
whatsappBusiness.phoneIdHelp: Found in Meta Business Suite > WhatsApp > API Setup
whatsappBusiness.apiKeyHelp: Get this from Interakt Dashboard > Settings > Developer Settings
whatsappBusiness.useTemplatesDesc: Send pre-approved WhatsApp templates (recommended). Turn off to send plain text.
whatsappBusiness.notifyTitle: Notifications sent to customers who opt-in:
whatsappBusiness.templateSetupDesc: Create these templates in your WhatsApp Business account: order_confirmation, order_packed, order_shipped, order_delivered, order_cancelled. Each template should accept the parameters shown in the notification list above.

abandonedCart.title: Abandoned Cart Reminders
abandonedCart.intro: Automatically remind customers who left items in their cart. Only works for logged-in customers who have a phone number or email on their account.
abandonedCart.toggleDesc: Send reminders via WhatsApp and/or email when customers leave items in their cart
abandonedCart.delayHelp: How long after the cart becomes inactive before sending the first reminder
abandonedCart.maxHelp: Additional reminders are sent at double the delay interval each time
abandonedCart.whatsappWarning: WhatsApp notifications must be enabled above with valid credentials for WhatsApp cart reminders to work.
abandonedCart.howItWorks1: Only logged-in customers with a phone number or email receive reminders
abandonedCart.howItWorks2: Customers who complete their order won't receive reminders
abandonedCart.howItWorks3: Phone numbers are collected during account signup
abandonedCart.howItWorks4: Reminders include product names, cart total, and a link back to the store
abandonedCart.templateDesc: Create a template named abandoned_cart_reminder in your WhatsApp Business account. It should accept parameters: customer name, store name, cart items summary, cart total, and store link.

payment.title: Payment Methods
payment.intro: Control which payment options are available to customers at checkout.
payment.codDesc: Customer pays when the order is delivered
payment.razorpayDesc: Credit/Debit Card, UPI, Net Banking — configure credentials below

credentials.title: Payment Credentials
credentials.intro: Enter your Razorpay credentials to enable online payments on your store.
credentials.secretPh: Leave empty to keep current secret

contactEditor.toggleDesc: Display 'Contact' link in the footer's customer service section

bookAppointmentEditor.toggleDesc: Display 'Book Appointment' link in the footer's customer service section

orderTrackEditor.toggleDesc: Display 'Track Order' link in the footer's customer service section
orderTrackEditor.urlHelp: If set, customers will be redirected to this URL. Otherwise, they'll see the built-in order tracking page.
orderTrackEditor.urlError: URL must start with http:// or https://

promoBannerEditor.toggleDesc: Display the rotating promotional banner at the top of every page
promoBannerEditor.messagesIntro: Add up to 3 promotional messages that rotate every 4 seconds at the top of every page.
promoBannerEditor.placeholder1: e.g. Free shipping on orders above ₹999
promoBannerEditor.placeholder3: e.g. Use code SAVE10 for 10% off

privacyEditor.introHelp: This text appears at the top of your Privacy Policy page before the sections.

termsEditor.introHelp: This text appears at the top of your Terms & Conditions page before the sections.

checkoutEditor.title: Coupon Codes
checkoutEditor.intro: Create discount coupons customers can apply at checkout. Codes are case-insensitive.
checkoutEditor.emptyHint: Click "Add Coupon" to create your first discount code
checkoutEditor.statusActive: ✓ Active — customers can use this code

billingSection.title: Billing
billingSection.notEnterprise: Overage billing is available on the Enterprise plan. Your current plan has fixed pricing — no usage invoices to show here.
billingSection.heading: Billing & overage invoices
billingSection.intro: Monthly invoices for storage above your enterprise plan's included quota. Invoices are emailed to your owner email on the 1st of each month.
billingSection.emptyUnpaid: No unpaid invoices. You're all caught up.
billingSection.customQuotaNote: A custom quota is in effect on your account.

locationsSection.title: Inventory Locations ({{count}})
locationsSection.priorityHelp: Lower = higher priority for order fulfillment
locationsSection.emptyDesc: Add your first inventory location to track stock across multiple places.
locationsSection.deleteConfirm: Delete location "{{name}}"? Stock must be zero or transferred first.
locationsSection.howItWorks1: 1. Create locations — Add your warehouses, stores, or fulfillment centers.
locationsSection.howItWorks2: 2. Set stock per location — Go to the Inventory tab to assign stock for each product at each location.
locationsSection.howItWorks3: 3. Transfer stock — Move inventory between locations from the Inventory tab.
locationsSection.howItWorks4: 4. Automatic fulfillment — When an order is placed, stock is deducted from the default location first, then by priority order. The total stock shown to customers is the sum across all locations.

storeLocationsEditor.cardTitle: Come Visit Us at Our Store
storeLocationsEditor.invalidImage: Please upload a JPG, PNG, or WebP image.
storeLocationsEditor.imageTooLarge: Image is too large. Maximum size is 10MB.
storeLocationsEditor.uploadFailed: Image upload failed. Please try again.
storeLocationsEditor.uploadFailedConn: Failed to upload image. Please check your connection.

trendingNowEditor.toggleDesc: Display a horizontal scrollable row of selected products
trendingNowEditor.emptySelected: No products selected yet. Add products from below.
trendingNowEditor.noProducts: No products in your store yet
trendingNowEditor.loadFailed: Failed to load trending products. Please refresh the page.

brandStoryEditor.toggleDesc: Display a brand narrative section with image and text on your homepage
brandStoryEditor.intro: Tell your brand's story with a beautiful split layout — an image on one side and your narrative on the other. This section helps build emotional connection with customers.
brandStoryEditor.clickUpload: Click or drag to upload image
brandStoryEditor.imageNote: If no image is uploaded, the section will show a centered text-only layout.
brandStoryEditor.storyPh: Tell your brand's story here — what drives you, what makes your products special, and why customers should care...
brandStoryEditor.invalidImage: Please upload a JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF image.
brandStoryEditor.imageTooLarge: Image is too large. Maximum size is 10MB.

welcomeBannerEditor.toggleDesc: Toggle the first-visit popup banner for new customers
welcomeBannerEditor.intro: This popup banner appears once for first-time visitors after 3 seconds. Customize the image, text, and button to welcome new customers.
welcomeBannerEditor.defaultMessage: Discover our exquisite collection. Sign up today to receive exclusive offers and updates.
welcomeBannerEditor.info: Leave fields empty to use the default text. The banner only shows once per visitor (resets when they clear browser data).

featuredVideoEditor.toggleDesc: Toggle the featured video section on your homepage
featuredVideoEditor.intro: A full-screen video section with text overlay and a chat button. This appears on your homepage below the Watch & Buy section.
featuredVideoEditor.clickUpload: Click or drag to upload video
featuredVideoEditor.chatLinkNote: Leave empty to use your store's WhatsApp number
featuredVideoEditor.invalidVideo: Please upload an MP4, WebM, or MOV video file.
featuredVideoEditor.videoTooLarge: Video is too large. Maximum size is 100MB.
featuredVideoEditor.uploadFailedConn: Failed to upload video. Please check your connection.

footerEditor.socialIntro: Add your social media profile URLs. These will appear as icons in the footer.
footerEditor.appBannerIntro: Show a "Download Our App" section in the footer with App Store and Google Play buttons.
footerEditor.showAppBannerDesc: Display app download buttons in the footer
footerEditor.hideBrandingDesc: Remove the platform branding from your storefront footer.
footerEditor.bottomNavIntro: Configure the mobile bottom navigation bar that appears on your store.

aboutUsEditor.toggleDesc: Toggle the About Us page visibility in your store
aboutUsEditor.heroIntro: The subtitle text that appears below your brand name on the About Us page hero banner.
aboutUsEditor.storyIntro: Tell your brand story. Use blank lines to separate paragraphs.
aboutUsEditor.clickUpload: Click or drag to upload image
aboutUsEditor.invalidImage: Please upload a JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF image.
aboutUsEditor.imageTooLarge: Image is too large. Maximum size is 10MB.

blogSection.title: Blog Management
blogSection.intro: Create and manage blog posts for your store.
blogSection.showBlogDesc: Enable the blog on your storefront
blogSection.inNavbarDesc: Add a Blog link in the storefront navigation bar
blogSection.empty: No blog posts yet. Click "New Post" to get started.
blogSection.loadFailed: Failed to load post. Please try again.
blogSection.excerptPh: Brief summary for the blog listing...

faqSection.title: FAQ Management
faqSection.intro: Add frequently asked questions for your customers.
faqSection.showFaqDesc: Enable the /faq page on your storefront
faqSection.inNavbarDesc: Add an FAQ link in the storefront navigation bar
faqSection.emptyState: No FAQ items yet. Click "Add Question" to get started.

pushNotificationsSection.title: Push Notifications
pushNotificationsSection.notConfigured: Push notifications are not yet configured on this platform. Contact support to enable them.
pushNotificationsSection.noSubs: No subscribers yet. Customers will see a prompt to subscribe when they visit your store.
pushNotificationsSection.uploadHint: JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF up to 5MB
pushNotificationsSection.btnLabelHint: Shows a clickable button on the notification
pushNotificationsSection.invalidImage: Please upload a JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF image.
pushNotificationsSection.autoIntro: Automatically send notifications when specific events occur in your store.
pushNotificationsSection.autoNewProductsDesc: Notify subscribers when you add new products
pushNotificationsSection.autoPriceDropsDesc: Alert customers when prices are reduced
pushNotificationsSection.autoLowStockDesc: Alert customers when only 3 or fewer items remain

customerReviewsEditor.defaultSectionSubtitle: Real reviews from our happy customers
customerReviewsEditor.toggleDescription: Toggle the customer reviews section on your homepage
customerReviewsEditor.sectionSettingsDescription: Customize the title and subtitle that appear above your customer reviews on the homepage.
customerReviewsEditor.sectionSubtitlePlaceholder: e.g., Real reviews from our happy customers
customerReviewsEditor.heading: Customer Reviews
customerReviewsEditor.emptyDescription: Add customer reviews with images and ratings. These appear in the "What Our Customers Say" section on your homepage.
customerReviewsEditor.uploadCta: Click or drag to upload image
customerReviewsEditor.reviewTextPlaceholder: e.g., Amazing quality! The jewelry is exactly as shown in the pictures.
customerReviewsEditor.errorInvalidImageType: Please upload a JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF image.
customerReviewsEditor.errorImageTooLarge: Image is too large. Maximum size is 10MB.

heroSliderEditor.title: Hero Slider
heroSliderEditor.usingDefaults: Showing default content. Edit and save to customize your hero slides.
heroSliderEditor.description: Configure slides for the hero section (up to {{max}}). Use the eye icon to show or hide individual slides.
heroSliderEditor.yearNote: Year ({{year}}) is added automatically on the storefront
heroSliderEditor.allHidden: All slides are hidden. At least one slide should be visible for the hero section to appear.
heroSliderEditor.showScrollButtonsHelp: Display left/right arrows on the hero slider
heroSliderEditor.loadFailed: Failed to load hero slider settings. Please refresh the page before making changes.

navbarEditor.logoDescription: Upload a logo to display in the navbar instead of your brand name. For best results, use a transparent PNG or SVG.
navbarEditor.logoActive: Logo is active. It will display in the navbar instead of your brand name.
navbarEditor.uploadHint: PNG, SVG, JPG, WebP, or GIF (max 10MB). Currently showing your brand name as text.
navbarEditor.logoSizeHint: Controls the logo width. If your logo has transparent space around it, try cropping it before uploading for best results.
navbarEditor.positionCenterHint: Logo will be centered in the navbar. On mobile, it stays in its default position.
navbarEditor.positionLeftHint: Logo will appear on the left side of the navbar (default).
navbarEditor.iconsDescription: Choose which icons to show in the navbar. Search and Wishlist icons are always visible.
navbarEditor.accountIconDesc: User/profile icon for login and account access
navbarEditor.cartIconDesc: Shopping bag icon with item count badge
navbarEditor.menuGroupsDescription: Create named menu groups for your store's navigation bar. Each group shows as a link in the navbar, and clicking it opens a dropdown with the links you add below. Groups without any links will show as a direct link (no dropdown).
navbarEditor.noMenusYet: No menu groups yet. Click "Add Menu Group" to get started.
navbarEditor.noMenusHint: When no menu groups are defined, the navbar will show your categories directly.
navbarEditor.deleteMenuMessage: Delete this menu group? All links inside it will be removed.
navbarEditor.howItWorksIntro: Menu Groups appear as top-level items in your navbar. Each group can have a dropdown of links.
navbarEditor.howItWorksMultiple: A group with multiple links shows a dropdown when hovered/clicked
navbarEditor.howItWorksOne: A group with one link navigates directly to that link
navbarEditor.howItWorksNone: A group with no links will not appear in the navbar
navbarEditor.howItWorksUnassigned: Categories not assigned to any group will still appear as individual links in the navbar (just like before)
navbarEditor.howItWorksFooter: Static links like Home, About, Contact etc. will always appear in the navbar. A category can only belong to one group — it will be marked if already used elsewhere.
navbarEditor.validateCustomLink: Please fill in both label and URL for all custom links, or remove empty ones.
navbarEditor.validateInvalidUrl: Invalid URL "{{url}}". URLs must start with / or http:// or https://.
navbarEditor.errorInvalidImage: Please upload a valid image file (JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, or SVG)

shopTheLookEditor.errorInvalidImageType: Please upload a JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF image.
shopTheLookEditor.toggleDescription: Display interactive product showcase on homepage
shopTheLookEditor.usingDefaultsNotice: Showing default placeholder content. Upload your own image and assign products, then save to make it live.
shopTheLookEditor.mainImageHelp: Upload the look/collection image. Click "Place a Dot" to add markers, then drag any dot to reposition it.
shopTheLookEditor.placeDotHint: Click on the image to place a dot
shopTheLookEditor.clickToUpload: Click to upload the look image
shopTheLookEditor.uploadFormats: JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF up to 10MB
shopTheLookEditor.productDotsHelp: Drag dots on the image to reposition them. Click a dot to select it and assign a product below.
shopTheLookEditor.skuPlaceholder: Enter product SKU or search by name...

shopperLanguageSection.title: Shopper Language Switcher
shopperLanguageSection.intro: Let shoppers translate your storefront content into other languages on demand using your own Microsoft Translator key. Microsoft bills you directly — Flomerce never charges you for translation. The first 2 million characters per month are free on Microsoft's free tier.
shopperLanguageSection.apiKeyPlaceholder: Paste your Microsoft Translator subscription key
shopperLanguageSection.apiKeyHint: Get this from Azure Portal > Translator resource > Keys and Endpoint.
shopperLanguageSection.apiKeyHintHasKey: A key is currently saved (shown masked above). Leave blank to keep it.
shopperLanguageSection.regionHint: Must match the region of your Azure Translator resource. Use "global" for region-less keys.
shopperLanguageSection.testSuccess: Microsoft accepted the key. Sample translation: "{{translation}}"
shopperLanguageSection.purgeTitle: Wipe all cached translations for this site so they are re-fetched fresh from Microsoft on the next shopper visit.
shopperLanguageSection.languagesHint: Pick which languages shoppers can switch to. English is always available.
shopperLanguageSection.enableHintDisabled: Save a translator key first to enable this.
shopperLanguageSection.enableHintEnabled: When on, shoppers see a language switcher in the storefront header.
shopperLanguageSection.usageBilling: Microsoft bills you directly. Their free tier covers the first 2,000,000 characters per month.
shopperLanguageSection.purgeSuccess: Translation cache cleared. {{count}} cached entries removed.
shopperLanguageSection.confirmPurge:
Clear all cached shopper translations for this site?

Every translated word will be re-fetched from Microsoft on the next shopper visit. This uses your translator quota. Use only after fixing a bad translation or rotating your key.
shopperLanguageSection.confirmRemove: Remove the saved Microsoft Translator key? Shopper translation will be turned off until you paste a new key.

visualCustomizer.unsavedPrompt: You have unsaved changes in this section. Discard them?
visualCustomizer.sectionsHint: Click a section to edit it. Toggle visibility with the eye icon.

watchBuySection.heading: Watch & Buy Videos
watchBuySection.defaultsNotice: Showing default placeholder content. Upload videos and link products to customize this section.
watchBuySection.noProductFound: No product found with this SKU. The video will still be saved.
watchBuySection.clickOrDrag: Click or drag to upload video
watchBuySection.invalidVideoType: Please upload an MP4, WebM, or MOV video file.
watchBuySection.videoTooLarge: Video is too large. Maximum size is 100MB.
watchBuySection.uploadConnectionError: Failed to upload video. Please check your connection.
